title: biscutella varia subsp. gracilis
intro: Biscutella varia subsp. gracilis, also known as the slender biscutella, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, typically found in mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Biscutella varia subsp. gracilis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
